2604.08544.title: SIM1: Physics-Aligned Simulator as Zero-Shot Data Scaler in Deformable Worlds
2604.08544.paper_summary: Robotic manipulation with deformable objects represents a data-intensive regime in embodied learning, where shape, contact, and topology co-evolve in ways that far exceed the variability of rigids. Although simulation promises relief from the cost of real-world data acquisition, prevailing sim-to-real pipelines remain rooted in rigid-body abstractions, producing mismatched geometry, fragile soft dynamics, and motion primitives poorly suited for cloth interaction. We posit that simulation fails not for being synthetic, but for being ungrounded. To address this, we introduce SIM1, a physics-aligned real-to-sim-to-real data engine that grounds simulation in the physical world. Given limited demonstrations, the system digitizes scenes into metric-consistent twins, calibrates deformable dynamics through elastic modeling, and expands behaviors via diffusion-based trajectory generation with quality filtering. This pipeline transforms sparse observations into scaled synthetic supervision with near-demonstration fidelity. Experiments show that policies trained on purely synthetic data achieve parity with real-data baselines at a 1:15 equivalence ratio, while delivering 90% zero-shot success and 50% generalization gains in real-world deployment. These results validate physics-aligned simulation as scalable supervision for deformable manipulation and a practical pathway for data-efficient policy learning.
2604.08544.paper_summary_zh: 機器人操作可變形物體代表了一種數據密集型的具身學習模式，其中形狀、接觸和拓撲以超越剛性物體變異性的方式共同演化。儘管模擬有望減輕現實世界數據獲取的成本，但現有的模擬到現實流程仍然根植於剛體抽象，產生不匹配的幾何形狀、脆弱的柔性動力學以及不適合布料互動的運動原語。我們認為模擬失敗並不是因為它是合成的，而是因為它缺乏基礎。為了解決這個問題，我們介紹了SIM1，一個物理對齊的真實到模擬再到真實的數據引擎，將模擬根植於物理世界。考慮到有限的示範，該系統將場景數字化為度量一致的雙胞胎，通過彈性建模校準可變形動力學，並通過基於擴散的軌跡生成和質量過濾擴展行為。這個流程將稀疏的觀察轉化為具有近似示範保真度的縮放合成監督。實驗顯示，基於純合成數據訓練的策略在1:15的等價比下達到了與真實數據基準相當的效果，同時在現實部署中實現了90%的零樣本成功率和50%的泛化增益。這些結果驗證了物理對齊的模擬作為可擴展監督的有效性，並為數據高效的策略學習提供了一條實用的途徑。
2604.08544.author: Yunsong Zhou et.al.
2604.08544.authors: Yunsong Zhou, Hangxu Liu, Xuekun Jiang, Xing Shen, Yuanzhen Zhou, Hui Wang, Baole Fang, Yang Tian, Mulin Yu, Qiaojun Yu, Li Ma, Hengjie Li, Hanqing Wang, Jia Zeng, Jiangmiao Pang
